content.en:
Seeing that the First Divine Lord promised to release the ten sons of the era, the Lord of the Yuan Gu sighed and said, "Okay, I'll tell you the secret of dodging the Great Destruction of the Universe!"

The First God Lord, the First Demon Lord, the Kunwu Supreme and the others immediately looked solemn and listened to the narration of the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said: "The universe is an incomparably huge celestial body in our eyes, but in the chaos, the universe is just an ordinary chaotic world. The universe is born and destroyed, but before it is completely destroyed, it will experience one cosmic collapse after another, which is a means for the universe to protect itself. And I was born in the first era of the universe, the first era of the universe is the universe has just been born, the resources are incomparably rich, and the opportunity is very great, even if the cultivation needs to start from scratch, but there is the power in the chaos to invest in the universe inheritance, so the cultivation has not taken the wrong path. I have achieved the Supreme in the First Universe Era, and the Supreme achieved as the Son of the Top Era, even other powerful Supremes are like ants in my eyes. It's a pity that I can't transcend it, because I didn't break the limitations of the universe and become a Supreme Highness when I was at the emperor level, and it was only the opportunity I got later that I was able to step into the top Son of the Era combat power. Because of that, I don't have the slightest chance of detachment. But I stumbled upon a heritage that tells the mysteries of the universe. One of the mysteries thrilled me, because he had the opportunity to let me live another cosmic epoch!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu paused, and then said, "This inheritance tells me that the twelve cosmic epochs of the universe will enter a reincarnation, and the thirteenth cosmic epoch is a new reincarnation era. As long as you create a special reincarnation arcana, you can reincarnate through the reincarnation arcana, avoid the origin of the universe, and directly reincarnate in a new reincarnation era. Since the universe has also been reincarnated, the cosmic origin of the thirteenth era will fall into a period of weakness, and it will be unable to control the creatures of the first twelve cosmic epochs to smuggle over, which is equivalent to the new cosmic epoch origin will erase everything before, so that once we smuggle into this cosmic era, although the cosmic origin will suppress us, it will not erase us, because in the eyes of the cosmic origin, we are at most a category, but not mortal people. Compared to you, you should also know why the previous cosmic era was able to cultivate the physical body, yuan power, and soul without any restrictions, but now this cosmic era restricts the soul, especially the physical body, and it is impossible to cultivate above the god level, that is because the universe origin has fallen into an extremely weak state, so it is necessary to suppress the growth of the creatures of this cosmic era, and once it waits for the next cosmic era, everything will recover. Therefore, this thirteenth cosmic epoch is an incomparably special cosmic epoch, and it is also the reason why we can live to this cosmic epoch!"

"Lord of the Ancient Ages, you can reincarnate in this cosmic era, why can people from other cosmic epochs too?"

The First Divine Lord questioned.

"Hahahaha!! "The Lord of the Yuan Gu laughed, "That's because I left the inheritance, and I also left the reincarnation treasure, and a certain force in the other eleven universe epochs got that reincarnation arcana, so that I can reincarnate in this cosmic era." However, the power of that reincarnation treasure is limited, and it can't make more people reincarnate in the thirteenth universe era, so they can only reincarnate these supreme beings and a few sons of the era!"

"Hmph, Lord of the Ancient Ages, in this way, you are only living one more epoch, why do you want to hide it from us, and you are so high-profile? You must still have a secret to hide from us, right?" the First Divine Lord asked.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said coldly: "First Divine Master, I don't need to answer your question, I have already told the answer. By the way, I'll tell you another secret, that reincarnation treasure is gone, and even if it's still there, it's useless to you. Now it's the thirteenth cosmic epoch, and the twelve cosmic epochs of the universe are reincarnated, and the rules will change every time, and I can't create a reincarnation treasure that can reincarnate in the twenty-fifth cosmic epoch!"

The First Divine Lord looked disappointed, if it was really as the Lord of the Yuan Gu said, they would not be able to avoid the Great Destruction of the Universe.

"The First Divine Master, the Lord of the Yuan Gu must still have secrets to tell us, I think their real purpose is to be transcendent. Didn't he say that he had obtained the inheritance of the great power in the chaos in the first place, and with the means of the Lord of the Ancient Ages, there would definitely be no way to destroy the inheritance of that great power, maybe we could find it too!" the Second God Lord said.

"When you go back, send the people to look for it with all your might!"

The First Divine Lord decided.

"Okay, let's release the children of the ten epochs!"

The First Divine Lord responded.

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme contacted Ye Tian and asked Ye Tian to release the ten sons of the era.

Ten Thousand Worlds, Heavenly Realm.

Ye Tian released the sons of the era one after another, but the premise was to let these sons of the era admit defeat.

Under the threat of death, these sons of the era naturally threw in the towel.

As soon as these sons of the era admit defeat, they directly caused Ye Tian's luck to skyrocket many times.

Meanwhile.

The scroll above the void of the Ten Thousand Worlds appeared, and a huge phanther enveloped the heavens and the earth, connecting with the origin of the universe.

The next moment.

Ye Tian was swept out of the Heavenly Realm by a scroll and stood in the void.

And then—

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Universe Origin poured into Ye Tian's body, and this power was very pure, similar to the power of the original Desolate Realm.

"Cultivating the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique!"

Ye Tian reacted, and immediately began to start the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

The Chaos Golden Desolation Technique comes from a great power in the chaos, which is incomparably mysterious, but also extremely difficult to cultivate.

If you cultivate according to normal means, your progress will be too slow.

Now, with the blessing of the Chaos Origin Power, Ye Tian's cultivation speed is getting faster and faster!

Originally, Ye Tian had already cultivated the fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the peak realm of entry, but now he broke the shackles in an instant and broke through to the Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe Xiaocheng Realm!

Medium-term!

Xiaocheng late!

Xiaocheng peak!

Dacheng realm!

Daesung mid-stage!

Later Dacheng!

......

Suddenly, Ye Tian couldn't feel the influx of Chaos Origin Power, and the fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Recipe was frozen in the late stage of Dacheng realm, not far from the consummation of the fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

Opening his eyes, Ye Tian felt that his body was in urgent need of energy.

He can continue to improve his physical body, and his combat power will skyrocket again!

Whoa!!!

A large number of galaxy levels were moved out of the Ten Thousand Realms, and Ye Tian also came out with them.

At this time, Ye Tian found that many galaxy-level qi had stayed in the Ten Thousand Realms forever, and although some of the galaxy-level luck had risen greatly, the harvest was not great.

This time, the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project finally only cast one person, and that was him-Ye Tian!

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But for the sake of the execution of the plan, the Wan Clan could only sacrifice these galaxy levels.

"Ye Tian, go back!"

The Kunwu Supreme appeared by Ye Tian's side, grabbed Ye Tian, and instantly returned to the temporary palace of the Kunwu Supreme Emperor.
